roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S OPP TO DEFT'S MTS EVID FILED
DEFT'S ATC MOT TO SEND TO JUVENILE COURT FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:MOTION TO SUSPEND CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS ANDCERTIFY CASE TO JUVENILE COURT IS FILED BY THE PUBLIC DEFENDER,/X:THE MOTION IS GRANTED BY THE COURT,/TEXT:COURT CERTIFIES DEFT TO YOUTH GUIDANCE CENTER/YGC1:MILTON ARTEAGA/YGC3:09-16-97/CO:DATE OF THE ALLEGED OFFENSE(S): 12-17-2014 AND 02-17-2015/X: WHEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID MINOR BETRANPORTED TO JUVENILE COURT, 375 WOODSIDE AVENUE, ROOM 214,/
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO SEND TO JUVENILE/INTC/X: DEFENSE MOTION TO SEND TOJUVENILE IS DENIED AT THIS TIME, PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE SET FOR 05-08-15IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF DEFENDANT'S RELEASE ONHIS OWN RECOGNIZANCE:/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH SPR BY 02-25-15/NTW60/LDPX:04-20-15/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:03-05-15/BAIL:25,000/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF O'FARRELL AND LARKIN STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO (150 YARDS)/CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 02-24-15/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-04-15/DO
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/BAIL:40000/X:LOVE WAIVER/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
